in the beginning, Salvador carry the game. at later stage, you'll have to level all skills to 3 at minimum, level up all of them for stats. then level up damage card, rouse (for some characters), and aliemus cards.
for exalt, prioritize level up Sanga and Salvador

btw, if you want to clear early stages fast, don't bring Saya with Salvador, Salv's blood pool increase much faster without Saya when your HP is full
